description_long: This is a green plush toy dog with a cartoonish appearance, featuring large blue eyes, a wide open mouth with visible white teeth, and a black nose. The toy has a red collar around its neck with white text, and its ears are perked up, giving it an alert and expressive look. The fur is uniformly green, with some subtle stitching details visible on the legs and face. The mouth interior is pink, contrasting with the green exterior, and the teeth are individually defined. The toy's limbs are short and rounded, and its tail is small and slightly curved. The overall build is soft and cuddly, designed for comfort and play.
description: A green plush dog toy with blue eyes, a red collar, and an open mouth showing white teeth. It has a soft, cuddly build and a cartoonish, expressive face.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toy's wide open mouth with visible teeth, blue eyes, black nose, and both perked ears.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red collar with white text, the open mouth, and the toy's left eye and ear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and the red collar with the full white text visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right eye, ear, and the side of the mouth, with part of the collar text visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is lively and slightly fierce, with wide blue eyes, raised eyebrows, and an open mouth showing pointed white teeth. The mouth and eyes give the toy an animated, energetic look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with front legs forward, head raised, and ears perked up. The tail is slightly curved and the mouth is open.
